list.description: Base URL for Portal URL — change to server IP for intranet access
list.label: Portal URL
list.name: portal_url

list.description: Base URL for Grafana URL — change to server IP for intranet access
list.label: Grafana URL
list.name: grafana_url
dbname
list.label: Oracle DB
list.query: SELECT value, label FROM (  SELECT '' AS value, '' AS label  UNION ALL  SELECT DISTINCT dbname AS value, dbname AS label FROM awr_load_profile) AS t ORDER BY value;

list.name: instance
list.label: Instance
list.query: SELECT value, label FROM (  SELECT '' AS value, '' AS label  UNION ALL  SELECT DISTINCT instance AS value, instance AS label  FROM awr_load_profile WHERE dbname='${dbname}') AS t ORDER BY value;

list.name: start_snap
list.label: Start Snap
list.query: SELECT '' AS label UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT begin_snap::int || ' - ' || to_char(snap_time,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') FROM awr_load_profile WHERE dbname='${dbname}' AND instance='${instance}' ORDER BY label NULLS FIRST;

list.name: end_snap
list.label: End Snap
list.query: SELECT '' AS label UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT begin_snap::int || ' - ' || to_char(snap_time,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') FROM awr_load_profile WHERE dbname='${dbname}' AND instance='${instance}' ORDER BY label NULLS FIRST;

list.name: hostname
list.label: SAR Hostname
list.query: SELECT value, label FROM (  SELECT '' AS value, '' AS label  UNION ALL  SELECT DISTINCT host_name AS value, host_name AS label  FROM awr_db_info  WHERE db_name = '${dbname}'  UNION ALL  SELECT DISTINCT hostname AS value, hostname AS label  FROM sar_cpu_stats  WHERE '${dbname}' = '') AS t WHERE value != '' ORDER BY value

options.content: ⬅ Portal Home  |  ⚠️ Problem Areas  |  🖥️ SAR Overview  |  📌 Navigation Hub

AWR+SAR Correlation — Overlays Oracle wait events with OS metrics on the same timeline. Select DB → Instance → Start/End Snap → SAR Hostname. SAR hostname list is pre-filtered to hosts with data matching the selected snap time window.

panels.title: I/O Correlation: Oracle Wait vs OS iowait
Oracle I/O Wait Events % DB Time  vs  OS iowait %

targets.rawSql:
SELECT snap_time AS time,
  event AS metric, pct_db_time AS "Oracle Wait % DB Time"
FROM awr_foreground_wait_events
WHERE dbname='${dbname}' AND '${dbname}' != ''
  AND instance='${instance}' AND '${instance}' != ''
  AND '${start_snap}' != '' AND '${end_snap}' != ''
  AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('${start_snap}',' - ',1)::int
                     AND split_part('${end_snap}',' - ',1)::int
  AND event IN ('db file sequential read','db file scattered read','direct path read')
ORDER BY snap_time

SELECT snap_time AS time, iowait_pct AS "OS iowait %"
FROM sar_cpu_stats
WHERE hostname='${hostname}' AND '${hostname}' != ''
  AND '${start_snap}' != '' AND '${end_snap}' != ''
  AND snap_time >= COALESCE(
    (SELECT snap_time - INTERVAL '30 minutes'
     FROM awr_load_profile
     WHERE dbname='${dbname}' AND instance='${instance}'
     AND begin_snap=split_part('${start_snap}',' - ',1)::int
     ORDER BY snap_time LIMIT 1),
    NOW() - INTERVAL '999 years')
AND snap_time <= COALESCE(
    (SELECT snap_time + INTERVAL '30 minutes'
     FROM awr_load_profile
     WHERE dbname='${dbname}' AND instance='${instance}'
     AND begin_snap=split_part('${end_snap}',' - ',1)::int
     ORDER BY snap_time LIMIT 1),
    NOW() + INTERVAL '999 years')
  AND cpu='all'
ORDER BY snap_time

panels.title: CPU Correlation: Oracle CPU % vs OS CPU
Oracle CPU Time % vs OS CPU user/system %

targets.rawSql:
SELECT snap_time AS time,
  ROUND(AVG(cpu_per_exec_s)::numeric,2) AS "Oracle CPU (s/exec)"
FROM awr_sql_cpu_time
WHERE dbname='${dbname}' AND '${dbname}' != ''
  AND instance='${instance}' AND '${instance}' != ''
  AND '${start_snap}' != '' AND '${end_snap}' != ''
  AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('${start_snap}',' - ',1)::int
                     AND split_part('${end_snap}',' - ',1)::int
GROUP BY snap_time ORDER BY snap_time

SELECT snap_time AS time,
  usr_pct AS "OS user %", system_pct AS "OS system %"
FROM sar_cpu_stats
WHERE hostname='${hostname}' AND '${hostname}' != ''
  AND '${start_snap}' != '' AND '${end_snap}' != ''
  AND snap_time >= COALESCE(
    (SELECT snap_time - INTERVAL '30 minutes'
     FROM awr_load_profile
     WHERE dbname='${dbname}' AND instance='${instance}'
     AND begin_snap=split_part('${start_snap}',' - ',1)::int
     ORDER BY snap_time LIMIT 1),
    NOW() - INTERVAL '999 years')
AND snap_time <= COALESCE(
    (SELECT snap_time + INTERVAL '30 minutes'
     FROM awr_load_profile
     WHERE dbname='${dbname}' AND instance='${instance}'
     AND begin_snap=split_part('${end_snap}',' - ',1)::int
     ORDER BY snap_time LIMIT 1),
    NOW() + INTERVAL '999 years')
  AND cpu='all'
ORDER BY snap_time

panels.title: Memory Correlation: OS Memory vs Swap
OS Memory Used % + Swap Used MB (memory pressure indicator)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT snap_time AS time,
  mem_used_pct AS "Mem Used %", commit_pct AS "Commit %"
FROM sar_memory_stats
WHERE hostname='${hostname}' AND '${hostname}' != ''
  AND '${start_snap}' != '' AND '${end_snap}' != ''
  AND snap_time >= COALESCE(
    (SELECT snap_time - INTERVAL '30 minutes'
     FROM awr_load_profile
     WHERE dbname='${dbname}' AND instance='${instance}'
     AND begin_snap=split_part('${start_snap}',' - ',1)::int
     ORDER BY snap_time LIMIT 1),
    NOW() - INTERVAL '999 years')
AND snap_time <= COALESCE(
    (SELECT snap_time + INTERVAL '30 minutes'
     FROM awr_load_profile
     WHERE dbname='${dbname}' AND instance='${instance}'
     AND begin_snap=split_part('${end_snap}',' - ',1)::int
     ORDER BY snap_time LIMIT 1),
    NOW() + INTERVAL '999 years')
ORDER BY snap_time

SELECT snap_time AS time, swap_used_mb AS "Swap Used MB"
FROM sar_swap_stats
WHERE hostname='${hostname}' AND '${hostname}' != ''
  AND '${start_snap}' != '' AND '${end_snap}' != ''
  AND snap_time >= COALESCE(
    (SELECT snap_time - INTERVAL '30 minutes'
     FROM awr_load_profile
     WHERE dbname='${dbname}' AND instance='${instance}'
     AND begin_snap=split_part('${start_snap}',' - ',1)::int
     ORDER BY snap_time LIMIT 1),
    NOW() - INTERVAL '999 years')
AND snap_time <= COALESCE(
    (SELECT snap_time + INTERVAL '30 minutes'
     FROM awr_load_profile
     WHERE dbname='${dbname}' AND instance='${instance}'
     AND begin_snap=split_part('${end_snap}',' - ',1)::int
     ORDER BY snap_time LIMIT 1),
    NOW() + INTERVAL '999 years')
ORDER BY snap_time

panels.title: Disk I/O Correlation: Oracle Segments vs OS Disk

targets.rawSql:
SELECT snap_time AS time,
  device || ' util%' AS metric, util_pct AS value
FROM sar_disk_stats
WHERE hostname='${hostname}' AND '${hostname}' != ''
  AND '${start_snap}' != '' AND '${end_snap}' != ''
  AND snap_time >= COALESCE(
    (SELECT snap_time - INTERVAL '30 minutes'
     FROM awr_load_profile
     WHERE dbname='${dbname}' AND instance='${instance}'
     AND begin_snap=split_part('${start_snap}',' - ',1)::int
     ORDER BY snap_time LIMIT 1),
    NOW() - INTERVAL '999 years')
AND snap_time <= COALESCE(
    (SELECT snap_time + INTERVAL '30 minutes'
     FROM awr_load_profile
     WHERE dbname='${dbname}' AND instance='${instance}'
     AND begin_snap=split_part('${end_snap}',' - ',1)::int
     ORDER BY snap_time LIMIT 1),
    NOW() + INTERVAL '999 years')
ORDER BY snap_time

SELECT snap_time AS time,
  ROUND(AVG(physical_reads)::numeric,0) AS "Oracle Physical Reads"
FROM awr_seg_phy_reads
WHERE dbname='${dbname}' AND '${dbname}' != ''
  AND instance='${instance}' AND '${instance}' != ''
  AND '${start_snap}' != '' AND '${end_snap}' != ''
  AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('${start_snap}',' - ',1)::int
                     AND split_part('${end_snap}',' - ',1)::int
GROUP BY snap_time ORDER BY snap_time
